name: AWS Feature
description: Allows outbound traffic to AWS endpoints by generating FQDNs from botocore endpoint data for the firewall

enableFirewall.description: Generate FQDN allow-list entries for AWS endpoints used by the firewall feature.

regions.description: Comma-separated list of AWS regions to allow (e.g. 'us-east-1,us-west-2'). If empty, all regions are allowed.

services.description: Comma-separated list of AWS services to allow (e.g. 's3,ec2'). If empty, all services are allowed.

createGrantedDir.description: Create the ~/.granted directory owned by the container user.

username.description: Username that owns created files and directories.
